title: Reportaje
writer: Julio Alejandro, Emilio Fernández, Mauricio Magdaleno
actors: Arturo de Córdova, Roberto Cañedo, Miguel Ángel Ferriz
plot: A press mogul (Ferriz) offers 10 thousand pesos to the journalist who discover the best news on New Year's Eve. The inquiry begins and journalists look in parties, hospitals and other places where news may be waiting.
